top_signals.title: Only in Argentina: Junk-Rated Bonds Yield Less Than US Treasuries
top_signals.summary: For all of President Javier Milei’s libertarian reforms, there are still all sorts of byzantine financial rules in place, like restrictions on lending and moving money overseas, that are creating distortions in Argentina’s capital markets.
